---
name: Plan-shaped work item
about: A structured plan whose body /auto-feature executes (becomes tasks/plan.md)
labels: [enhancement]
---

<!-- This is the skeleton only. For what goes in each section and the judgment calls
(FL_GATES, bats tests, generic vs. own-config, semver intent), read
docs/creating-an-issue.md. Worked examples: #11 and #18. -->

## Problem

<!-- What is wrong or missing today, and why it matters here. -->

## Decision

<!-- The approach chosen, plus rejected alternatives with one line each on why. -->

## Architecture / Files

<!-- The shape of the change and the specific files it touches. -->

## Task list

### Task 1 — <title>

- **Acceptance:** <what is true when this task is done, stated so it can be checked>
- **Verification:** <the exact gate command(s) that prove it, e.g. from FL_GATES>
- **Files:** <files this task expects to touch>

## Out of scope

<!-- What this issue deliberately does not do. -->

## Checkpoints

<!-- Natural stopping points where the tree is green and reviewable. -->

## Risks

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|
| <risk> | <low/medium/high> | <how it is mitigated> |
